news.t: Hull Tactical Announces Transfer of Exchange Listing of Hull Tactical US ETF
Hull Tactical announces first options trade for Hull Tactical US ETF (HTUS)

holdings.infoBox: HTUS is an equity ETF with a total of 149 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Capitol Series Trust - Hull Tactical US ETF (HTUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund aims for capital appreciation, regardless of market cycle, using long, short and leveraged positions in the S&P 500, along with cash. The actively managed fund primarily uses ETFs to gain exposure to the equity component of its portfolio. HTUS was launched on Jun 25, 2015 and is issued by Exchange Traded Concepts.

data.title: Hull Tactical Announces Transfer of Exchange Listing of Hull Tactical US ETF
data.text: CHICAGO , Dec. 30, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- The Hull Tactical team announced intentions to transfer the Hull Tactical US ETF (HTUS) from NYSE Arca, Inc. ("NYSE Arca") to CBOE BZX Exchange, Inc. ("CBOE") o...

data.title: Hull Tactical announces first options trade for Hull Tactical US ETF (HTUS)
